title: Sponsor segments are content, not interruptions
principle: A sponsor read treated as an ad tanks retention; treated as genuinely entertaining content, it can hold or even boost it. The integration must earn its place.
rule: Build sponsor integrations as their own mini-bit (a stunt, demo, or joke that uses the product) rather than a flat read. Place it after a re-engagement beat, never in the fragile first minute.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: BRAND DEALS ARE CONTENT! And when treated as such boosts retention
